Description: Von Paris Moving is a full-service moving company based in Baltimore that offers residential, commercial, and international relocation services. They provide comprehensive support for long-distance moves, including packing, unpacking, and storage solutions, as well as document management services to help clients manage their belongings efficiently. The company operates state-of-the-art storage facilities with humidity-controlled chambers, ensuring secure and efficient handling of client goods. Their team consists of experienced professionals who ensure smooth transitions and personalized service throughout the move process.

Name: Richard McGibboney
Title: Operations/Project Manager
Description: Ward North American is a moving company that offers a range of services for both residential and commercial moves in Texas. Their main functionalities include local, long-distance, corporate relocation, household storage, art and piano moving, and third-party moving. They provide free quotes, conduct background checks for drivers, and offer specialized services such as furniture installation and hospital move management. The company emphasizes professional training for their movers and aims to ensure safe and efficient moving experiences.

Title: Founder & CEO
Description: Surv's Local Home Services offers a range of home maintenance and moving assistance for homeowners. Their main functionality includes providing services such as local moving, furniture assembly, junk removal, yard work, gardening, and more. Customers can book jobs online in just three simple steps, after which trained team members will arrive to complete their to-do list tasks efficiently. The company emphasizes community service by ensuring that all staff are insured and trained to meet individual customer needs.

Name: Michael Waterman
Title: Owner
Description: Wheaton World Wide Moving is a moving company that offers a range of services for residential, corporate, and commercial moves. Their main functionalities include providing estimates, organizing move-in/out-of-state moves, packing, and storage solutions. They operate a network of over 300 local agents across the U.S., offering tailored moving packages for various needs such as senior relocations, employer relocation, and international moves. Wheaton emphasizes customer service and quality assurance throughout the moving process, ensuring timely communication and support for clients.

Name: Hussein Makata
Title: operations manager
Description: World Wide Movers Inc. is a national moving company that offers a range of services including long-distance moving, residential relocations, corporate relocation, and specialized moves for medical equipment and military transfers. They provide packing, shipping, and secured temperature controlled storage solutions to streamline the moving process. The company operates multiple branches in Alaska, including Anchorage and Washington State, and emphasizes customer service with certified movers and competitive pricing.
